title: openclaw/openclaw
summary: OpenClaw 是一个跨平台、跨操作系统的个人AI助手项目，强调用户数据自主权（own-your-data）。该项目以“龙虾方式”为特色，支持多种平台，旨在提供个性化的AI助手体验。目前拥有超过38万星标，表明其受到广泛关注。
summary_en: OpenClaw is a cross-platform, cross-OS personal AI assistant project that emphasizes user data ownership (own-your-data). Featuring a 'lobster way' approach, it supports multiple platforms and aims to provide a personalized AI assistant experience. With over 383K stars, it has gained significant attention.
